no: Note: Standalone download URL not currently findable — mod may have been removed from public distribution. The fix is for Aura NPC's Cleric/Thief kit. If installing, source may need to come from archive/backup. Cleric/Thief Arrows Usability Fix by ArtemiusI. Fixes a bug where Aura NPC's Cleric/Thief multiclass kit cannot equip or use arrows. Install after Aura NPC.

dependencies.reason: Fixes arrow usability specifically for the Aura NPC Cleric/Thief kit

sum: Fixes arrow usability for Aura NPC's Cleric/Thief multiclass kit, ensuring the character can properly equip and use arrows.

co.n: Aura NPC: Cleric/Thief Arrows Usability Fix
co.no: Patches Aura's Cleric/Thief kit to allow arrow equipping. Without this fix, the multiclass kit inherits Cleric weapon restrictions that block arrows.
